raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
  MAX(cost) AS max_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
  MIN(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 2)) AS min_warranty_years,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 2)) AS max_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
  MAX(cost) AS max_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
  MIN(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n)) AS min_warranty_years,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n)) AS max_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN cost < 500   THEN '1_low (<500)'
    WHEN cost < 2000  THEN '2_mid (500-2000)'
    WHEN cost < 5000  THEN '3_high (2000-5000)'
    ELSE              '4_premium (5000+)'
  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, cost_tier
ORDER BY model_category, cost_tier;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN cost < ?n   THEN ?s
    WHEN cost < ?n  THEN ?s
    WHEN cost < ?n  THEN ?s
    ELSE              ?s
  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, cost_tier
ORDER BY model_category, cost_tier;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (cost < 500) THEN '1_low (<500)'::text WHEN (cost < 2000) THEN '2_mid (500-2000)'::text WHEN (cost < 5000) THEN '3_high (2000-5000)'::text ELSE '4_premium (5000+)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN cost < 500   THEN '1_low (<500)'
    WHEN cost < 2000  THEN '2_mid (500-2000)'
    WHEN cost < 5000  THEN '3_high (2000-5000)'
    ELSE              '4_premium (5000+)'
  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)
    / NULLIF(AVG(cost), 0) * 1000
  , 3) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, cost_tier
ORDER BY warranty_years_per_1k_cost DESC;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN cost < ?n   THEN ?s
    WHEN cost < ?n  THEN ?s
    WHEN cost < ?n  THEN ?s
    ELSE              ?s
  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)
    / NULLIF(AVG(cost), ?n) * ?n
  , ?n) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, cost_tier
ORDER BY warranty_years_per_1k_cost DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (cost < 500) THEN '1_low (<500)'::text WHEN (cost < 2000) THEN '2_mid (500-2000)'::text WHEN (cost < 5000) THEN '3_high (2000-5000)'::text ELSE '4_premium (5000+)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)
    / NULLIF(AVG(cost), 0) * 1000
  , 3) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN ('Server', 'Web Server', 'Computer')
GROUP BY department, model_category
ORDER BY model_category, avg_warranty_years DESC;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)
    / NULLIF(AVG(cost), ?n) * ?n
  , ?n) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN (?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY department, model_category
ORDER BY model_category, avg_warranty_years DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM purchased_on)::integer AS purchase_year,
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY purchase_year, model_category
ORDER BY model_category, purchase_year;
template:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM purchased_on)::integer AS purchase_year,
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY purchase_year, model_category
ORDER BY model_category, purchase_year;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  asset_tag,
  display_name,
  model_category,
  department,
  cost,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 2) AS warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25
    / NULLIF(cost, 0) * 1000
  , 4) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE cost > 5000
ORDER BY warranty_years_per_1k_cost ASC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
  asset_tag,
  display_name,
  model_category,
  department,
  cost,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n) AS warranty_years,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n
    / NULLIF(cost, ?n) * ?n
  , ?n) AS warranty_years_per_1k_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE cost > ?n
ORDER BY warranty_years_per_1k_cost ASC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 0)::integer AS warranty_years_rounded,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
  MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN ('Server', 'Web Server')
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_years_rounded
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_years_rounded;
template:

  model_category,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n)::integer AS warranty_years_rounded,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,

  MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_years_rounded
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_years_rounded;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 1) AS warranty_years_bin,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
  MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category = 'Computer' AND cost BETWEEN 500 AND 2000
GROUP BY warranty_years_bin
ORDER BY warranty_years_bin;
template:

  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n) AS warranty_years_bin,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
  MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category = ?s AND cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
GROUP BY warranty_years_bin
ORDER BY warranty_years_bin;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  display_name,
  ci,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
  MIN(purchased_on::date) AS earliest_purchase,
  MAX(purchased_on::date) AS latest_purchase
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category = 'Computer' AND cost BETWEEN 500 AND 2000
GROUP BY display_name, ci
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
  display_name,
  ci,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
  MIN(purchased_on::date) AS earliest_purchase,
  MAX(purchased_on::date) AS latest_purchase
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category = ?s AND cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
GROUP BY display_name, ci
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  cost_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM (
  SELECT
    cost,
    warranty_expiration,
    purchased_on,
    width_bucket(cost, 1500, 2500, 20) AS bucket_num,
    ROUND(cost / 50.0) * 50 AS cost_bucket
  FROM flag_16
  WHERE model_category = 'Computer' AND cost BETWEEN 1500 AND 2500
) sub
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY cost_bucket;
template:
SELECT
  cost_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM (
  SELECT
    cost,
    warranty_expiration,
    purchased_on,
    width_bucket(cost, ?n, ?n, ?n) AS bucket_num,
    ROUND(cost / ?n) * ?n AS cost_bucket
  FROM flag_16
  WHERE model_category = ?s AND cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
) sub
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY cost_bucket;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(CORR(cost, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 4) AS cost_warranty_corr,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY cost_warranty_corr DESC;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(CORR(cost, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS cost_warranty_corr,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY cost_warranty_corr DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH computer_regression AS (
  SELECT
    REGR_SLOPE(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25,
      cost
    ) AS slope,
    REGR_INTERCEPT(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25,
      cost
    ) AS intercept
  FROM flag_16
  WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
)
SELECT
  f.model_category,
  f.asset_tag,
  f.cost,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f.warranty_expiration - f.purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 2) AS actual_warranty_years,
  ROUND((cr.slope * f.cost + cr.intercept)::numeric, 2) AS expected_warranty_years,
  ROUND(((cr.slope * f.cost + cr.intercept) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f.warranty_expiration - f.purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS warranty_gap_years
FROM flag_16 f, computer_regression cr
WHERE f.model_category IN ('Server', 'Web Server')
ORDER BY warranty_gap_years DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
WITH computer_regression AS (
  SELECT
    REGR_SLOPE(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n,
      cost
    ) AS slope,
    REGR_INTERCEPT(
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n,
      cost
    ) AS intercept
  FROM flag_16
  WHERE model_category = ?s
)
SELECT
  f.model_category,
  f.asset_tag,
  f.cost,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f.warranty_expiration - f.purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n) AS actual_warranty_years,
  ROUND((cr.slope * f.cost + cr.intercept)::numeric, ?n) AS expected_warranty_years,
  ROUND(((cr.slope * f.cost + cr.intercept) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (f.warranty_expiration - f.purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS warranty_gap_years
FROM flag_16 f, computer_regression cr
WHERE f.model_category IN (?s, ?s)
ORDER BY warranty_gap_years DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25, 0)::integer AS warranty_years,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  SUM(cost) AS total_spend,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY model_category), 1) AS pct_of_category
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN ('Server', 'Web Server', 'Computer')
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_years
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_years;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n, ?n)::integer AS warranty_years,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  SUM(cost) AS total_spend,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY model_category), ?n) AS pct_of_category
FROM flag_16
WHERE model_category IN (?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_years
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_years;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN '1_expired'
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL '6 months' THEN '2_expiring_6mo'
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN '3_expiring_12mo'
    ELSE '4_covered'
  END AS warranty_status,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  SUM(cost) AS total_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_status
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_status;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  CASE
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN ?s
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?s
    WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS warranty_status,
  COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
  SUM(cost) AS total_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category, warranty_status
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_status;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (warranty_expiration < now()) THEN '1_expired'::text WHEN (warranty_expiration < (now() + '6 mons'::interval)) THEN '2_expiring_6mo'::text WHEN (warranty_expiration < (now() + '1 year'::interval)) THEN '3_expiring_12mo'::text ELSE '4_covered'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  warranty_status,
  asset_count,
  total_cost
FROM (
  SELECT
    model_category,
    CASE
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN '1_expired'
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL '6 months' THEN '2_expiring_6mo'
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN '3_expiring_12mo'
      ELSE '4_covered'
    END AS warranty_status,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    SUM(cost) AS total_cost
  FROM flag_16
  GROUP BY model_category, warranty_status
) sub
WHERE model_category IN ('Server', 'Web Server')
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_status;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  warranty_status,
  asset_count,
  total_cost
FROM (
  SELECT
    model_category,
    CASE
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN ?s
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?s
      WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?s
      ELSE ?s
    END AS warranty_status,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    SUM(cost) AS total_cost
  FROM flag_16
  GROUP BY model_category, warranty_status
) sub
WHERE model_category IN (?s, ?s)
ORDER BY model_category, warranty_status;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (flag_16.warranty_expiration < now()) THEN '1_expired'::text WHEN (flag_16.warranty_expiration < (now() + '6 mons'::interval)) THEN '2_expiring_6mo'::text WHEN (flag_16.warranty_expiration < (now() + '1 year'::interval)) THEN '3_expiring_12mo'::text ELSE '4_covered'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS total_assets,
  SUM(cost) AS total_portfolio_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN cost ELSE 0 END) AS expired_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN cost ELSE 0 END) AS at_risk_12mo_value,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN cost ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost), 0), 1) AS pct_expired_by_value,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(cost) / NULLIF(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25), 0)) AS cost_per_warranty_year
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY at_risk_12mo_value DESC;
template:
SELECT
  model_category,
  COUNT(*) AS total_assets,
  SUM(cost) AS total_portfolio_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN cost ELSE ?n END) AS expired_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() + INTERVAL ?s THEN cost ELSE ?n END) AS at_risk_12mo_value,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < NOW() THEN cost ELSE ?n END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost), ?n), ?n) AS pct_expired_by_value,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
  ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(cost) / NULLIF(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n), ?n)) AS cost_per_warranty_year
FROM flag_16
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY at_risk_12mo_value DESC;
